check.pattern: either keep-first or keep-last is valid

check.command: node --input-type=module -e 'import {parseRange} from "./src/parse/parseRange.js"; const r=JSON.stringify(parseRange("-3-7")); if(r!=="[-3,7]"){console.error("negative range:",r);process.exit(1)}'

check.pattern: spaces around unquoted fields are preserved verbatim
doubled quotes inside a quoted field become one quote
two names use 'and' with no comma

check.command: node -e "const c = require('./config/app.json'); const ok = c.name === 'demo-service' && c.version === '2.0.0' && c.server.host === 'localhost' && c.server.port === 8080 && c.features.beta === false && c.features.darkMode === true; process.exit(ok ? 0 : 1)"

check.pattern: caps values above the upper bound
Anti-no-op guard for the no-progress task

check.command: node -e "const c=require('./config/settings.json'); const ok = c.schemaVersion===2 && c.service==='billing' && c.timeout===30000 && !('timeoutSeconds' in c) && !Array.isArray(c.endpoints) && c.endpoints.create.path==='/v1/create' && c.endpoints.create.retry.max===3 && c.endpoints.status.retry.max===0; process.exit(ok?0:1)"

check.pattern: single-digit fractions are worth ten times the cents
themeFor splits users for the 50% dark-mode flag
